title: FalkorDB
description: Lets agents query a FalkorDB graph database with Cypher.
Provides query (read-only by default, server-enforced), list_graphs and get_schema.

tool_falkordb.host.title: Host
tool_falkordb.host.description: FalkorDB host, e.g. localhost or your-instance.falkordb.cloud.

tool_falkordb.username.title: Username
tool_falkordb.username.description: Username, e.g. "default" for FalkorDB Cloud. Leave empty for no auth.

tool_falkordb.password.title: Password
tool_falkordb.password.description: Password for the FalkorDB instance. Leave empty for no auth.

tool_falkordb.tls.title: TLS
tool_falkordb.tls.description: Connect with TLS (FalkorDB Cloud TLS endpoints).

tool_falkordb.graph.title: Default Graph
tool_falkordb.graph.description: Graph queried when the agent does not pass one explicitly.

tool_falkordb.allow_writes.title: Allow Writes
tool_falkordb.allow_writes.description: Permit CREATE/MERGE/SET/DELETE. When off, queries run via GRAPH.RO_QUERY and the server rejects write clauses.

tool_falkordb.max_rows.title: Max Rows
tool_falkordb.max_rows.description: Upper cap on rows returned to the agent per query.

tool_falkordb.query_timeout_ms.title: Query Timeout (ms)
tool_falkordb.query_timeout_ms.description: Server-side timeout for a single query.
